languages.text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны солдаты охраны гробницы, исчезли из всех записей, но остались героями, которых помнят поколения. Именно они и приняли на себя первый удар много лет спустя, погибнув полным составом, но не уступив врагу и дав силам династии время на мобилизацию и контратаку.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.
languages.original_text: Батальон Безымянных Последних, как стали известны солдаты охраны гробницы, исчезли из всех записей, но остались героями, которых помнят поколения. Именно они и приняли на себя первый удар много лет спустя, погибнув полным составом, но не уступив врагу и дав силам династии время на мобилизацию и контратаку.

traits.locale_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

languages.text: 無名最後の連隊として知られる墓守の兵士たちは、記録から消えたが、後の世代には英雄として記憶された。何年もの後、彼らは最初の攻撃を受け、連隊の全員が死亡したが、敵に屈せず、王朝軍が動員し反撃を開始する時間を稼いだ。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: 無名最後の連隊として知られる墓守の兵士たちは、記録から消えたが、後の世代には英雄として記憶された。何年もの後、彼らは最初の攻撃を受け、連隊の全員が死亡したが、敵に屈せず、王朝軍が動員し反撃を開始する時間を稼いだ。

languages.text: 那支被称为“无名终旅营”的墓穴守卫部队虽然从所有官方记录中消失了，却作为隐秘的英雄被后世铭记。许多年后，他们承受了第一波攻击，全营尽数阵亡，但无一人投降。正是他们争取到的时间，才让王朝军队得以完成动员并反击。
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: 那支被称为“无名终旅营”的墓穴守卫部队虽然从所有官方记录中消失了，却作为隐秘的英雄被后世铭记。许多年后，他们承受了第一波攻击，全营尽数阵亡，但无一人投降。正是他们争取到的时间，才让王朝军队得以完成动员并反击。

languages.text: Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, disparut de toutes les archives, mais il laissa dans les mémoires des générations suivantes l'image d'une troupe héroïque. De nombreuses années plus tard, tous ses membres périrent lors d'un assaut ennemi qui les avait pris pour cibles en premier. Ils parvinrent cependant à résister assez longtemps pour permettre aux troupes de la dynastie de se mobiliser et de lancer une contre-attaque.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: Le bataillon des derniers Sans-nom, comme on nomma les gardes du tombeau, disparut de toutes les archives, mais il laissa dans les mémoires des générations suivantes l'image d'une troupe héroïque. De nombreuses années plus tard, tous ses membres périrent lors d'un assaut ennemi qui les avait pris pour cibles en premier. Ils parvinrent cependant à résister assez longtemps pour permettre aux troupes de la dynastie de se mobiliser et de lancer une contre-attaque.

languages.text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, desapareció de todo registro, pero las generaciones posteriores lo recordaron como un grupo de héroes. Muchos años después, se produjo el primer golpe y, a pesar de que los Últimos cayeron al completo, lucharon hasta el final, lo que dio tiempo a las fuerzas de la dinastía para movilizarse y lanzar un contraataque.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: El Batallón de los Últimos Sin Nombre, como se conoció a los guardias de la tumba, desapareció de todo registro, pero las generaciones posteriores lo recordaron como un grupo de héroes. Muchos años después, se produjo el primer golpe y, a pesar de que los Últimos cayeron al completo, lucharon hasta el final, lo que dio tiempo a las fuerzas de la dinastía para movilizarse y lanzar un contraataque.

languages.text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu tüm kayıtlardan silinse de sonraki nesillerce kahraman olarak hatırlandılar. Yıllar sonra taburun her bir mensubunu öldüren ilk darbeyi aldılar ancak düşmana boyun eğmediler, hanedanlık güçlerine seferber olmaları ve karşı saldırı başlatmaları için zaman kazandırdılar.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: Mezarı koruyan askerlerin bilindiği adıyla İsimsiz Sona Kalan Taburu tüm kayıtlardan silinse de sonraki nesillerce kahraman olarak hatırlandılar. Yıllar sonra taburun her bir mensubunu öldüren ilk darbeyi aldılar ancak düşmana boyun eğmediler, hanedanlık güçlerine seferber olmaları ve karşı saldırı başlatmaları için zaman kazandırdılar.

languages.text: Das Bataillon der Namenlosen Letzten, wie die Wachen der Gruft genannt wurden, verschwand aus allen Aufzeichnungen, aber die Soldaten selbst wurde von späteren Generationen als Helden verehrt. Viele Jahre später wurden alle Mitglieder des Bataillons durch den ersten Angriff des Feindes getötet. Allerdings hatten sie sich diesem nicht ergeben, sondern den Streitkräften der Dynastie genug Zeit verschafft, um zu einem Gegenschlag auszuholen.
languages.original_text: The Battalion of the Nameless Last, as the tomb guard soldiers became known, vanished from all records, but were remembered as heroes by later generations. Many years later, they bore the first blow, which killed every member of the battalion, but they did not yield to the enemy, giving the dynasty's forces time to mobilise and launch a counter-attack.

traits.locale_text: Das Bataillon der Namenlosen Letzten, wie die Wachen der Gruft genannt wurden, verschwand aus allen Aufzeichnungen, aber die Soldaten selbst wurde von späteren Generationen als Helden verehrt. Viele Jahre später wurden alle Mitglieder des Bataillons durch den ersten Angriff des Feindes getötet. Allerdings hatten sie sich diesem nicht ergeben, sondern den Streitkräften der Dynastie genug Zeit verschafft, um zu einem Gegenschlag auszuholen.
